   182→func NewSupervisor(logger *zap.Logger, cfg config.Supervisor) (*Supervisor, error) {
   183→	s := &Supervisor{
   184→		pidProvider:                  defaultPIDProvider{},
   185→		hasNewConfig:                 make(chan struct{}, 1),
   186→		agentConfigOwnMetricsSection: &atomic.Value{},
   187→		cfgState:                     &atomic.Value{},
   188→		effectiveConfig:              &atomic.Value{},
   189→		agentDescription:             &atomic.Value{},
   190→		availableComponents:          &atomic.Value{},
   191→		doneChan:                     make(chan struct{}),
   192→		customMessageToServer:        make(chan *protobufs.CustomMessage, maxBufferedCustomMessages),
   193→		agentConn:                    &atomic.Value{},
   194→		featureGates:                 map[string]struct{}{},
   195→	}
   196→	if err := s.createTemplates(); err != nil {
   197→		return nil, err
   198→	}
   199→
   200→	telSettings, err := initTelemetrySettings(logger, cfg.Telemetry)
   201→	if err != nil {
   202→		return nil, err
   203→	}
   204→	s.telemetrySettings = telSettings
   205→
   206→	if err := cfg.Validate(); err != nil {
   207→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error validating config: %w", err)
   208→	}
   209→	s.config = cfg
   210→
   211→	if err := os.MkdirAll(s.config.Storage.Directory, 0o700); err != nil {
   212→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error creating storage dir: %w", err)
   213→	}
   214→
   215→	s.configApplyTimeout = s.config.Agent.ConfigApplyTimeout
   216→
   217→	return s, nil
   218→}
   219→
   220→func initTelemetrySettings(logger *zap.Logger, cfg config.Telemetry) (telemetrySettings, error) {
   221→	readers := cfg.Metrics.Readers
   222→	if cfg.Metrics.Level == configtelemetry.LevelNone {
   223→		readers = []telemetryconfig.MetricReader{}
   224→	}
   225→
   226→	pcommonRes := pcommon.NewResource()
   227→	for k, v := range cfg.Resource {
   228→		pcommonRes.Attributes().PutStr(k, *v)
   229→	}
   230→
   231→	if _, ok := cfg.Resource[string(semconv.ServiceNameKey)]; !ok {
   232→		pcommonRes.Attributes().PutStr(string(semconv.ServiceNameKey), "opamp-supervisor")
   233→	}
   234→
   235→	if _, ok := cfg.Resource[string(semconv.ServiceInstanceIDKey)]; !ok {
   236→		instanceUUID, _ := uuid.NewRandom()
   237→		instanceID := instanceUUID.String()
   238→		pcommonRes.Attributes().PutStr(string(semconv.ServiceInstanceIDKey), instanceID)
   239→	}
   240→
   241→	// TODO currently we do not have the build info containing the version available to set semconv.ServiceVersionKey
   242→
   243→	var attrs []telemetryconfig.AttributeNameValue
   244→	for k, v := range pcommonRes.Attributes().All() {
   245→		attrs = append(attrs, telemetryconfig.AttributeNameValue{Name: k, Value: v.Str()})
   246→	}
   247→
   248→	sch := semconv.SchemaURL
   249→
   250→	ctx := context.Background()
   251→
   252→	sdk, err := telemetryconfig.NewSDK(
   253→		telemetryconfig.WithContext(ctx),
   254→		telemetryconfig.WithOpenTelemetryConfiguration(
   255→			telemetryconfig.OpenTelemetryConfiguration{
   256→				MeterProvider: &telemetryconfig.MeterProvider{
   257→					Readers: readers,
   258→				},
   259→				TracerProvider: &telemetryconfig.TracerProvider{
   260→					Processors: cfg.Traces.Processors,
   261→				},
   262→				LoggerProvider: &telemetryconfig.LoggerProvider{
   263→					Processors: cfg.Logs.Processors,
   264→				},
   265→				Resource: &telemetryconfig.Resource{
   266→					SchemaUrl:  &sch,
   267→					Attributes: attrs,
   268→				},
   269→			},
   270→		),
   271→	)
   272→	if err != nil {
   273→		return telemetrySettings{}, err
   274→	}
   275→
   276→	var lp log.LoggerProvider
   277→	if len(cfg.Logs.Processors) > 0 {
   278→		lp = sdk.LoggerProvider()
   279→		logger = logger.WithOptions(zap.WrapCore(func(c zapcore.Core) zapcore.Core {
   280→			core, err := zapcore.NewIncreaseLevelCore(zapcore.NewTee(
   281→				c,
   282→				otelzap.NewCore("github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/cmd/opampsupervisor",
   283→					otelzap.WithLoggerProvider(lp),
   284→				),
   285→			), zap.NewAtomicLevelAt(cfg.Logs.Level))
   286→			if err != nil {
   287→				panic(err)
   288→			}
   289→			return core
   290→		}))
   291→	}
   292→
   293→	return telemetrySettings{
   294→		component.TelemetrySettings{
   295→			Logger:         logger,
   296→			TracerProvider: sdk.TracerProvider(),
   297→			MeterProvider:  sdk.MeterProvider(),
   298→			Resource:       pcommonRes,
   299→		},
   300→		lp,
   301→	}, nil
   302→}
   303→
   304→func (s *Supervisor) Start() error {
   305→	var err error
   306→	s.persistentState, err = loadOrCreatePersistentState(s.persistentStateFilePath(), s.telemetrySettings.Logger)
   307→	if err != nil {
   308→		return err
   309→	}
   310→
   311→	if err = s.getFeatureGates(); err != nil {
   312→		return fmt.Errorf("could not get feature gates from the Collector: %w", err)
   313→	}
   314→
   315→	if err = s.getBootstrapInfo(); err != nil {
   316→		return fmt.Errorf("could not get bootstrap info from the Collector: %w", err)
   317→	}
   318→
   319→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Info("Supervisor starting",
   320→		zap.String("id", s.persistentState.InstanceID.String()))
   321→
   322→	if err = s.startOpAMP(); err != nil {
   323→		return fmt.Errorf("cannot start OpAMP client: %w", err)
   324→	}
   325→
   326→	err = s.loadAndWriteInitialMergedConfig()
   327→	if err != nil {
   328→		return fmt.Errorf("failed loading initial config: %w", err)
   329→	}
   330→
   331→	s.commander, err = commander.NewCommander(
   332→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger,
   333→		s.config.Storage.Directory,
   334→		s.config.Agent,
   335→		"--config", s.agentConfigFilePath(),
   336→	)
   337→	if err != nil {
   338→		return err
   339→	}
   340→
   341→	s.agentWG.Add(1)
   342→	go func() {
   343→		defer s.agentWG.Done()
   344→		s.runAgentProcess()
   345→	}()
   346→
   347→	s.customMessageWG.Add(1)
   348→	go func() {
   349→		defer s.customMessageWG.Done()
   350→		s.forwardCustomMessagesToServerLoop()
   351→	}()
   352→
   353→	return nil
   354→}
   355→
   356→func (s *Supervisor) getFeatureGates() error {
   357→	cmd, err := commander.NewCommander(
   358→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger,
   359→		s.config.Storage.Directory,
   360→		s.config.Agent,
   361→		"featuregate",
   362→	)
   363→	if err != nil {
   364→		return err
   365→	}
   366→
   367→	stdout, _, err := cmd.StartOneShot()
   368→	if err != nil {
   369→		return err
   370→	}
   371→	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(bytes.NewBuffer(stdout))
   372→
   373→	// First line only contains headers, discard it.
   374→	_ = scanner.Scan()
   375→	for scanner.Scan() {
   376→		line := scanner.Text()
   377→		i := strings.Index(line, " ")
   378→		flag := line[0:i]
   379→
   380→		if flag == AllowNoPipelinesFeatureGate {
   381→			s.featureGates[AllowNoPipelinesFeatureGate] = struct{}{}
   382→		}
   383→	}
   384→	if err := scanner.Err(); err != nil {
   385→		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "reading standard input:", err)
   386→	}
   387→
   388→	return nil
   389→}

   391→func (s *Supervisor) createTemplates() error {
   392→	var err error
   393→
   394→	if s.noopPipelineTemplate, err = template.New("nooppipeline").Parse(noopPipelineTpl); err != nil {
   395→		return err
   396→	}
   397→	if s.extraConfigTemplate, err = template.New("extraconfig").Parse(extraConfigTpl); err != nil {
   398→		return err
   399→	}
   400→	if s.opampextensionTemplate, err = template.New("opampextension").Parse(opampextensionTpl); err != nil {
   401→		return err
   402→	}
   403→	if s.ownTelemetryTemplate, err = template.New("owntelemetry").Parse(ownTelemetryTpl); err != nil {
   404→		return err
   405→	}
   406→
   407→	return nil
   408→}
   409→
   410→// getBootstrapInfo obtains the Collector's agent description by
   411→// starting a Collector with a specific config that only starts
   412→// an OpAMP extension, obtains the agent description, then
   413→// shuts down the Collector. This only needs to happen
   414→// once per Collector binary.
   415→func (s *Supervisor) getBootstrapInfo() (err error) {
   416→	_, span := s.getTracer().Start(context.Background(), "GetBootstrapInfo")
   417→	defer span.End()
   418→	s.opampServerPort, err = s.getSupervisorOpAMPServerPort()
   419→	if err != nil {
   420→		span.SetStatus(codes.Error, fmt.Sprintf("Could not get supervisor opamp service port: %v", err))
   421→		return err
   422→	}
   423→
   424→	bootstrapConfig, err := s.composeNoopConfig()
   425→	if err != nil {
   426→		span.SetStatus(codes.Error, fmt.Sprintf("Could not compose noop config config: %v", err))
   427→		return err
   428→	}
   429→
   430→	err = os.WriteFile(s.agentConfigFilePath(), bootstrapConfig, 0o600)
   431→	if err != nil {
   432→		span.SetStatus(codes.Error, fmt.Sprintf("Failed to write agent config: %v", err))
   433→		return fmt.Errorf("failed to write agent config: %w", err)
   434→	}
   435→
   436→	srv := server.New(newLoggerFromZap(s.telemetrySettings.Logger, "opamp-server"))
   437→
   438→	done := make(chan error, 1)
   439→	var connected atomic.Bool
   440→	var doneReported atomic.Bool
   441→
   442→	// Start a one-shot server to get the Collector's agent description
   443→	// and available components using the Collector's OpAMP extension.
   444→	err = srv.Start(flattenedSettings{
   445→		endpoint: fmt.Sprintf("localhost:%d", s.opampServerPort),
   446→		onConnecting: func(_ *http.Request) (bool, int) {
   447→			connected.Store(true)
   448→			return true, http.StatusOK
   449→		},
   450→		onMessage: func(_ serverTypes.Connection, message *protobufs.AgentToServer) *protobufs.ServerToAgent {
   451→			response := &protobufs.ServerToAgent{}
   452→			if message.GetAvailableComponents() != nil {
   453→				s.setAvailableComponents(message.AvailableComponents)
   454→			}
   455→
   456→			if message.AgentDescription != nil {
   457→				instanceIDSeen := false
   458→				s.setAgentDescription(message.AgentDescription)
   459→				identAttr := message.AgentDescription.IdentifyingAttributes
   460→
   461→				for _, attr := range identAttr {
   462→					if attr.Key == string(semconv.ServiceInstanceIDKey) {
   463→						if attr.Value.GetStringValue() != s.persistentState.InstanceID.String() {
   464→							done <- fmt.Errorf(
   465→								"the Collector's instance ID (%s) does not match with the instance ID set by the Supervisor (%s): %w",
   466→								attr.Value.GetStringValue(),
   467→								s.persistentState.InstanceID.String(),
   468→								errNonMatchingInstanceUID,
   469→							)
   470→							return response
   471→						}
   472→						instanceIDSeen = true
   473→					}
   474→				}
   475→
   476→				if !instanceIDSeen {
   477→					done <- errors.New("the Collector did not specify an instance ID in its AgentDescription message")
   478→					return response
   479→				}
   480→			}
   481→
   482→			// agent description must be defined
   483→			_, ok := s.agentDescription.Load().(*protobufs.AgentDescription)
   484→			if !ok {
   485→				return response
   486→			}
   487→
   488→			// if available components have not been reported, agent description is sufficient to continue
   489→			availableComponents, availableComponentsOk := s.availableComponents.Load().(*protobufs.AvailableComponents)
   490→			if availableComponentsOk {
   491→				// must have a full list of components if available components have been reported
   492→				if availableComponents.GetComponents() != nil {
   493→					if !doneReported.Load() {
   494→						done <- nil
   495→						doneReported.Store(true)
   496→					}
   497→				} else {
   498→					// if we don't have a full component list, ask for it
   499→					response.Flags = uint64(protobufs.ServerToAgentFlags_ServerToAgentFlags_ReportAvailableComponents)
   500→				}
   501→				return response
   502→			}
   503→
   504→			// need to only report done once, not on each message - otherwise, we get a hung thread
   505→			if !doneReported.Load() {
   506→				done <- nil
   507→				doneReported.Store(true)
   508→			}
   509→
   510→			return response
   511→		},
   512→	}.toServerSettings())
   513→	if err != nil {
   514→		span.SetStatus(codes.Error, fmt.Sprintf("Could not start OpAMP server: %v", err))
   515→		return err
   516→	}
   517→
   518→	defer func() {
   519→		if stopErr := srv.Stop(context.Background()); stopErr != nil {
   520→			err = errors.Join(err, fmt.Errorf("error when stopping the opamp server: %w", stopErr))
   521→		}
   522→	}()
   523→
   524→	flags := []string{
   525→		"--config", s.agentConfigFilePath(),
   526→	}
   527→	featuregateFlag := s.getFeatureGateFlag()
   528→	if len(featuregateFlag) > 0 {
   529→		flags = append(flags, featuregateFlag...)
   530→	}
   531→	cmd, err := commander.NewCommander(
   532→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger,
   533→		s.config.Storage.Directory,
   534→		s.config.Agent,
   535→		flags...,
   536→	)
   537→	if err != nil {
   538→		span.SetStatus(codes.Error, fmt.Sprintf("Could not start Agent: %v", err))
   539→		return err
   540→	}
   541→
   542→	if err = cmd.Start(context.Background()); err != nil {
   543→		span.SetStatus(codes.Error, fmt.Sprintf("Could not start Agent: %v", err))
   544→		return err
   545→	}
   546→
   547→	defer func() {
   548→		if stopErr := cmd.Stop(context.Background()); stopErr != nil {
   549→			err = errors.Join(err, fmt.Errorf("error when stopping the collector: %w", stopErr))
   550→		}
   551→	}()
   552→
   553→	select {
   554→	case <-time.After(s.config.Agent.BootstrapTimeout):
   555→		if connected.Load() {
   556→			msg := "collector connected but never responded with an AgentDescription message"
   557→			span.SetStatus(codes.Error, msg)
   558→			return errors.New(msg)
   559→		} else {
   560→			msg := "collector's OpAMP client never connected to the Supervisor"
   561→			span.SetStatus(codes.Error, msg)
   562→			return errors.New(msg)
   563→		}
   564→	case err = <-done:
   565→		if errors.Is(err, errNonMatchingInstanceUID) {
   566→			// try to report the issue to the OpAMP server
   567→			if startOpAMPErr := s.startOpAMPClient(); startOpAMPErr == nil {
   568→				defer func(s *Supervisor) {
   569→					if stopErr := s.stopOpAMPClient(); stopErr != nil {
   570→						s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not stop OpAmp client", zap.Error(stopErr))
   571→					}
   572→				}(s)
   573→				if healthErr := s.opampClient.SetHealth(&protobufs.ComponentHealth{
   574→					Healthy:   false,
   575→					LastError: err.Error(),
   576→				}); healthErr != nil {
   577→					s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not report health to OpAMP server", zap.Error(healthErr))
   578→				}
   579→			} else {
   580→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not start OpAMP client to report health to server", zap.Error(startOpAMPErr))
   581→			}
   582→		}
   583→		if err != nil {
   584→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not complete bootstrap", zap.Error(err))
   585→			span.SetStatus(codes.Error, err.Error())
   586→		} else {
   587→			span.SetStatus(codes.Ok, "")
   588→		}
   589→		return err
   590→	}
   591→}

   605→func (s *Supervisor) startOpAMPClient() error {
   606→	// determine if we need to load a TLS config or not
   607→	var tlsConfig *tls.Config
   608→	parsedURL, err := url.Parse(s.config.Server.Endpoint)
   609→	if err != nil {
   610→		return fmt.Errorf("parse server endpoint: %w", err)
   611→	}
   612→	if parsedURL.Scheme == "wss" || parsedURL.Scheme == "https" {
   613→		tlsConfig, err = s.config.Server.TLS.LoadTLSConfig(context.Background())
   614→		if err != nil {
   615→			return err
   616→		}
   617→	}
   618→	logger := newLoggerFromZap(s.telemetrySettings.Logger, "opamp-client")
   619→	switch parsedURL.Scheme {
   620→	case "ws", "wss":
   621→		s.opampClient = client.NewWebSocket(logger)
   622→	case "http", "https":
   623→		s.opampClient = client.NewHTTP(logger)
   624→	default:
   625→		return fmt.Errorf("unsupported scheme in server endpoint: %q", parsedURL.Scheme)
   626→	}
   627→
   628→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Connecting to OpAMP server...", zap.String("endpoint", s.config.Server.Endpoint), zap.Any("headers", s.config.Server.Headers))
   629→	settings := types.StartSettings{
   630→		OpAMPServerURL:     s.config.Server.Endpoint,
   631→		Header:             s.config.Server.Headers,
   632→		TLSConfig:          tlsConfig,
   633→		InstanceUid:        types.InstanceUid(s.persistentState.InstanceID),
   634→		RemoteConfigStatus: s.persistentState.GetLastRemoteConfigStatus(),
   635→		Callbacks: types.Callbacks{
   636→			OnConnect: func(_ context.Context) {
   637→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Info("Connected to the server.")
   638→			},
   639→			OnConnectFailed: func(_ context.Context, err error) {
   640→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to connect to the server", zap.Error(err))
   641→			},
   642→			OnError: func(_ context.Context, err *protobufs.ServerErrorResponse) {
   643→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Server returned an error response", zap.String("message", err.ErrorMessage))
   644→			},
   645→			OnMessage: s.onMessage,
   646→			OnOpampConnectionSettings: func(ctx context.Context, settings *protobufs.OpAMPConnectionSettings) error {
   647→				//nolint:errcheck
   648→				go s.onOpampConnectionSettings(ctx, settings)
   649→				return nil
   650→			},
   651→			OnCommand: func(_ context.Context, command *protobufs.ServerToAgentCommand) error {
   652→				cmdType := command.GetType()
   653→				if *cmdType.Enum() == protobufs.CommandType_CommandType_Restart {
   654→					return s.handleRestartCommand()
   655→				}
   656→				return nil
   657→			},
   658→			SaveRemoteConfigStatus: func(_ context.Context, _ *protobufs.RemoteConfigStatus) {
   659→				// TODO: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/issues/21079
   660→			},
   661→			GetEffectiveConfig: func(_ context.Context) (*protobufs.EffectiveConfig, error) {
   662→				return s.createEffectiveConfigMsg(), nil
   663→			},
   664→		},
   665→		Capabilities: s.config.Capabilities.SupportedCapabilities(),
   666→	}
   667→	ad := s.agentDescription.Load().(*protobufs.AgentDescription)
   668→	if err = s.opampClient.SetAgentDescription(ad); err != nil {
   669→		return err
   670→	}
   671→
   672→	if err = s.opampClient.SetHealth(&protobufs.ComponentHealth{Healthy: false}); err != nil {
   673→		return err
   674→	}
   675→
   676→	if ac, ok := s.availableComponents.Load().(*protobufs.AvailableComponents); ok && ac != nil {
   677→		if err = s.opampClient.SetAvailableComponents(ac); err != nil {
   678→			return err
   679→		}
   680→	}
   681→
   682→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Starting OpAMP client...")
   683→	if err = s.opampClient.Start(context.Background(), settings); err != nil {
   684→		return err
   685→	}
   686→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("OpAMP client started.")
   687→
   688→	return nil
   689→}

   691→// startOpAMPServer starts an OpAMP server that will communicate
   692→// with an OpAMP extension running inside a Collector to receive
   693→// data from inside the Collector. The internal server's lifetime is not
   694→// matched to the Collector's process, but may be restarted
   695→// depending on information received by the Supervisor from the remote
   696→// OpAMP server.
   697→func (s *Supervisor) startOpAMPServer() error {
   698→	s.opampServer = server.New(newLoggerFromZap(s.telemetrySettings.Logger, "opamp-server"))
   699→
   700→	var err error
   701→	s.opampServerPort, err = s.getSupervisorOpAMPServerPort()
   702→	if err != nil {
   703→		return err
   704→	}
   705→
   706→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Starting OpAMP server...")
   707→
   708→	connected := &atomic.Bool{}
   709→
   710→	err = s.opampServer.Start(flattenedSettings{
   711→		endpoint: fmt.Sprintf("localhost:%d", s.opampServerPort),
   712→		onConnecting: func(_ *http.Request) (bool, int) {
   713→			// Only allow one agent to be connected the this server at a time.
   714→			alreadyConnected := connected.Swap(true)
   715→			return !alreadyConnected, http.StatusConflict
   716→		},
   717→		onMessage: s.handleAgentOpAMPMessage,
   718→		onConnectionClose: func(_ serverTypes.Connection) {
   719→			connected.Store(false)
   720→		},
   721→	}.toServerSettings())
   722→	if err != nil {
   723→		return err
   724→	}
   725→
   726→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("OpAMP server started.")
   727→
   728→	return nil
   729→}

   731→func (s *Supervisor) handleAgentOpAMPMessage(conn serverTypes.Connection, message *protobufs.AgentToServer) *protobufs.ServerToAgent {
   732→	s.agentConn.Store(conn)
   733→
   734→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Received OpAMP message from the agent")
   735→	if message.AgentDescription != nil {
   736→		s.setAgentDescription(message.AgentDescription)
   737→	}
   738→
   739→	if message.EffectiveConfig != nil {
   740→		if cfg, ok := message.EffectiveConfig.GetConfigMap().GetConfigMap()[""]; ok {
   741→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Received effective config from agent")
   742→			s.effectiveConfig.Store(string(cfg.Body))
   743→			err := s.opampClient.UpdateEffectiveConfig(context.Background())
   744→			if err != nil {
   745→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("The OpAMP client failed to update the effective config", zap.Error(err))
   746→			}
   747→		} else {
   748→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Got effective config message, but the instance config was not present. Ignoring effective config.")
   749→		}
   750→	}
   751→
   752→	// Proxy client capabilities to server
   753→	if message.CustomCapabilities != nil {
   754→		err := s.opampClient.SetCustomCapabilities(message.CustomCapabilities)
   755→		if err != nil {
   756→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to send custom capabilities to OpAMP server")
   757→		}
   758→	}
   759→
   760→	// Proxy agent custom messages to server
   761→	if message.CustomMessage != nil {
   762→		select {
   763→		case s.customMessageToServer <- message.CustomMessage:
   764→		default:
   765→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Warn(
   766→				"Buffer full, skipping forwarding custom message to server",
   767→				zap.String("capability", message.CustomMessage.Capability),
   768→				zap.String("type", message.CustomMessage.Type),
   769→			)
   770→		}
   771→	}
   772→
   773→	if message.Health != nil {
   774→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Received health status from agent", zap.Bool("healthy", message.Health.Healthy))
   775→		s.lastHealthFromClient.Store(message.Health)
   776→		err := s.opampClient.SetHealth(message.Health)
   777→		if err != nil {
   778→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not report health to OpAMP server", zap.Error(err))
   779→		}
   780→	}
   781→
   782→	return &protobufs.ServerToAgent{}
   783→}
   784→
   785→func (s *Supervisor) forwardCustomMessagesToServerLoop() {
   786→	for {
   787→		select {
   788→		case cm := <-s.customMessageToServer:
   789→			for {
   790→				sendingChan, err := s.opampClient.SendCustomMessage(cm)
   791→				switch {
   792→				case errors.Is(err, types.ErrCustomMessagePending):
   793→					s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Custom message pending, waiting to send...")
   794→					<-sendingChan
   795→					continue
   796→				case err == nil: // OK
   797→					s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Custom message forwarded to server.")
   798→				default:
   799→					s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to send custom message to OpAMP server")
   800→				}
   801→				break
   802→			}
   803→		case <-s.doneChan:
   804→			return
   805→		}
   806→	}
   807→}

   810→func (s *Supervisor) setAgentDescription(ad *protobufs.AgentDescription) {
   811→	ad.IdentifyingAttributes = applyKeyValueOverrides(s.config.Agent.Description.IdentifyingAttributes, ad.IdentifyingAttributes)
   812→	ad.NonIdentifyingAttributes = applyKeyValueOverrides(s.config.Agent.Description.NonIdentifyingAttributes, ad.NonIdentifyingAttributes)

   820→
   821→// applyKeyValueOverrides merges the overrides map into the array of key value pairs.
   822→// If a key from overrides already exists in the array of key value pairs, it is overwritten by the value from the overrides map.
   823→// An array of KeyValue pair is returned, with each key value pair having a distinct key.
   824→func applyKeyValueOverrides(overrides map[string]string, orig []*protobufs.KeyValue) []*protobufs.KeyValue {
   825→	kvMap := make(map[string]*protobufs.KeyValue, len(orig)+len(overrides))
   826→
   827→	for _, kv := range orig {
   828→		kvMap[kv.Key] = kv
   829→	}
   830→
   831→	for k, v := range overrides {
   832→		kvMap[k] = &protobufs.KeyValue{
   833→			Key: k,
   834→			Value: &protobufs.AnyValue{
   835→				Value: &protobufs.AnyValue_StringValue{
   836→					StringValue: v,
   837→				},
   838→			},
   839→		}
   840→	}
   841→
   842→	// Sort keys for stable output, makes it easier to test.
   843→	keys := make([]string, 0, len(kvMap))
   844→	for k := range kvMap {
   845→		keys = append(keys, k)
   846→	}
   847→
   848→	sort.Strings(keys)
   849→
   850→	kvOut := make([]*protobufs.KeyValue, 0, len(kvMap))
   851→	for _, k := range keys {
   852→		v := kvMap[k]
   853→		kvOut = append(kvOut, v)
   854→	}
   855→
   856→	return kvOut
   857→}

   859→func (s *Supervisor) stopOpAMPClient() error {
   860→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Stopping OpAMP client...")
   861→	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
   862→	defer cancel()
   863→	err := s.opampClient.Stop(ctx)
   864→	// TODO(srikanthccv): remove context.DeadlineExceeded after https://github.com/open-telemetry/opamp-go/pull/213
   865→	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, context.DeadlineExceeded) {
   866→		return err
   867→	}
   868→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("OpAMP client stopped.")
   869→
   870→	return nil
   871→}

   881→func (s *Supervisor) onOpampConnectionSettings(_ context.Context, settings *protobufs.OpAMPConnectionSettings) error {
   882→	if settings == nil {
   883→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Received ConnectionSettings request with nil settings")
   884→		return nil
   885→	}
   886→
   887→	newServerConfig := config.OpAMPServer{}
   888→
   889→	if settings.DestinationEndpoint != "" {
   890→		newServerConfig.Endpoint = settings.DestinationEndpoint
   891→	}
   892→	if settings.Headers != nil {
   893→		newServerConfig.Headers = s.getHeadersFromSettings(settings.Headers)
   894→	}
   895→	if settings.Certificate != nil {
   896→		if len(settings.Certificate.CaCert) != 0 {
   897→			newServerConfig.TLS.CAPem = configopaque.String(settings.Certificate.CaCert)
   898→		}
   899→		if len(settings.Certificate.Cert) != 0 {
   900→			newServerConfig.TLS.CertPem = configopaque.String(settings.Certificate.Cert)
   901→		}
   902→		if len(settings.Certificate.PrivateKey) != 0 {
   903→			newServerConfig.TLS.KeyPem = configopaque.String(settings.Certificate.PrivateKey)
   904→		}
   905→	} else {
   906→		newServerConfig.TLS = configtls.NewDefaultClientConfig()
   907→		newServerConfig.TLS.InsecureSkipVerify = true
   908→	}
   909→
   910→	if err := newServerConfig.Validate(); err != nil {
   911→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("New OpAMP settings resulted in invalid configuration", zap.Error(err))
   912→		return err
   913→	}
   914→
   915→	if err := s.stopOpAMPClient(); err != nil {
   916→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Cannot stop the OpAMP client", zap.Error(err))
   917→		return err
   918→	}
   919→
   920→	// take a copy of the current OpAMP server config
   921→	oldServerConfig := s.config.Server
   922→	// update the OpAMP server config
   923→	s.config.Server = newServerConfig
   924→
   925→	if err := s.startOpAMPClient(); err != nil {
   926→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Cannot connect to the OpAMP server using the new settings", zap.Error(err))
   927→		// revert the OpAMP server config
   928→		s.config.Server = oldServerConfig
   929→		// start the OpAMP client with the old settings
   930→		if err := s.startOpAMPClient(); err != nil {
   931→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Cannot reconnect to the OpAMP server after restoring old settings", zap.Error(err))
   932→			return err
   933→		}
   934→	}
   935→	return nil
   936→}

   968→func (s *Supervisor) composeExtraLocalConfig() []byte {
   969→	var cfg bytes.Buffer
   970→	resourceAttrs := map[string]string{}
   971→	ad := s.agentDescription.Load().(*protobufs.AgentDescription)
   972→	for _, attr := range ad.IdentifyingAttributes {
   973→		resourceAttrs[attr.Key] = attr.Value.GetStringValue()
   974→	}
   975→	for _, attr := range ad.NonIdentifyingAttributes {
   976→		resourceAttrs[attr.Key] = attr.Value.GetStringValue()
   977→	}
   978→	tplVars := map[string]any{
   979→		"ResourceAttributes": resourceAttrs,
   980→		"SupervisorPort":     s.opampServerPort,
   981→	}
   982→	err := s.extraConfigTemplate.Execute(
   983→		&cfg,
   984→		tplVars,
   985→	)
   986→	if err != nil {
   987→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not compose local config", zap.Error(err))
   988→		return nil
   989→	}
   990→
   991→	return cfg.Bytes()

   994→func (s *Supervisor) composeOpAMPExtensionConfig() []byte {
   995→	orphanPollInterval := 5 * time.Second
   996→	if s.config.Agent.OrphanDetectionInterval > 0 {
   997→		orphanPollInterval = s.config.Agent.OrphanDetectionInterval
   998→	}
   999→
  1000→	var cfg bytes.Buffer
  1001→	tplVars := map[string]any{
  1002→		"InstanceUid":                s.persistentState.InstanceID.String(),
  1003→		"SupervisorPort":             s.opampServerPort,
  1004→		"PID":                        s.pidProvider.PID(),
  1005→		"PPIDPollInterval":           orphanPollInterval,
  1006→		"ReportsAvailableComponents": s.config.Capabilities.ReportsAvailableComponents,
  1007→	}
  1008→	err := s.opampextensionTemplate.Execute(
  1009→		&cfg,
  1010→		tplVars,
  1011→	)
  1012→	if err != nil {
  1013→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not compose local config", zap.Error(err))
  1014→		return nil
  1015→	}
  1016→
  1017→	return cfg.Bytes()
  1018→}

  1020→func (s *Supervisor) composeAgentConfigFiles() []byte {
  1021→	conf := confmap.New()
  1022→
  1023→	for _, file := range s.config.Agent.ConfigFiles {
  1024→		cfgBytes, err := os.ReadFile(file)
  1025→		if err != nil {
  1026→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not read local config file", zap.Error(err))
  1027→			continue
  1028→		}
  1029→
  1030→		cfgMap, err := yaml.Parser().Unmarshal(cfgBytes)
  1031→		if err != nil {
  1032→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not unmarshal local config file", zap.Error(err))
  1033→			continue
  1034→		}
  1035→		err = conf.Merge(confmap.NewFromStringMap(cfgMap))
  1036→		if err != nil {
  1037→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not merge local config file: "+file, zap.Error(err))
  1038→			continue
  1039→		}
  1040→	}
  1041→
  1042→	b, err := yaml.Parser().Marshal(conf.ToStringMap())
  1043→	if err != nil {
  1044→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not marshal merged local config files", zap.Error(err))
  1045→		return []byte("")
  1046→	}
  1047→	return b
  1048→}

  1050→// loadAndWriteInitialMergedConfig loads and writes the initial config by
  1051→// merging the last received remote config, last received own metrics config,
  1052→// and any local configs.
  1053→func (s *Supervisor) loadAndWriteInitialMergedConfig() error {
  1054→	// load the last received remote config
  1055→	s.loadRemoteConfig()
  1056→
  1057→	// load the last received own telemetry config
  1058→	s.loadLastReceivedOwnTelemetryConfig()
  1059→
  1060→	// compose the initial merged config
  1061→	_, err := s.composeMergedConfig(s.remoteConfig)
  1062→	if err != nil {
  1063→		return fmt.Errorf("could not compose initial merged config: %w", err)
  1064→	}
  1065→
  1066→	// write the initial merged config to disk
  1067→	cfgState := s.cfgState.Load().(*configState)
  1068→	if err := os.WriteFile(s.agentConfigFilePath(), []byte(cfgState.mergedConfig), 0o600); err != nil {
  1069→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to write agent config.", zap.Error(err))
  1070→	}
  1071→
  1072→	return nil
  1073→}

  1075→// loadRemoteConfig loads the last received remote config from file if the capability is supported.
  1076→func (s *Supervisor) loadRemoteConfig() {
  1077→	if !s.config.Capabilities.AcceptsRemoteConfig {
  1078→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Remote config is not supported, will not attempt to load config from file")
  1079→		return
  1080→	}
  1081→
  1082→	// Try to load the last received remote config if it exists.
  1083→	var lastRecvRemoteConfig []byte
  1084→	var err error
  1085→	lastRecvRemoteConfig, err = os.ReadFile(filepath.Join(s.config.Storage.Directory, lastRecvRemoteConfigFile))
  1086→	switch {
  1087→	case err == nil:
  1088→		config := &protobufs.AgentRemoteConfig{}
  1089→		err = proto.Unmarshal(lastRecvRemoteConfig, config)
  1090→		if err != nil {
  1091→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Cannot parse last received remote config", zap.Error(err))
  1092→		} else {
  1093→			s.remoteConfig = config
  1094→		}
  1095→	case errors.Is(err, os.ErrNotExist):
  1096→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Info("No last received remote config found")
  1097→	default:
  1098→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("error while reading last received config", zap.Error(err))
  1099→	}
  1100→}

  1102→// loadLastReceivedOwnTelemetryConfig loads the last received own telemetry config from file if the capability is supported.
  1103→func (s *Supervisor) loadLastReceivedOwnTelemetryConfig() {
  1104→	// If none of the own telemetry capabilities are supported, do nothing.
  1105→	if !s.config.Capabilities.ReportsOwnMetrics && !s.config.Capabilities.ReportsOwnTraces && !s.config.Capabilities.ReportsOwnLogs {
  1106→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Own telemetry is not supported, will not attempt to load config from file")
  1107→		return
  1108→	}
  1109→
  1110→	// Try to load the last received own metrics config if it exists.
  1111→	var lastRecvOwnTelemetryConfig []byte
  1112→	var err error
  1113→	lastRecvOwnTelemetryConfig, err = os.ReadFile(filepath.Join(s.config.Storage.Directory, lastRecvOwnTelemetryConfigFile))
  1114→	if err == nil {
  1115→		set := &protobufs.ConnectionSettingsOffers{}
  1116→		err = proto.Unmarshal(lastRecvOwnTelemetryConfig, set)
  1117→		if err != nil {

  1119→		} else {

  1122→	}

  1149→func (s *Supervisor) updateOwnTelemetryData(data map[string]any, signal string, settings *protobufs.TelemetryConnectionSettings) map[string]any {
  1150→	if settings == nil || len(settings.DestinationEndpoint) == 0 {
  1151→		return data
  1152→	}
  1153→	data[fmt.Sprintf("%sEndpoint", signal)] = settings.DestinationEndpoint
  1154→	data[fmt.Sprintf("%sHeaders", signal)] = []protobufs.Header{}
  1155→
  1156→	if settings.Headers != nil {

  1158→	}

  1162→func (s *Supervisor) setupOwnTelemetry(_ context.Context, settings *protobufs.ConnectionSettingsOffers) (configChanged bool) {
  1163→	var cfg bytes.Buffer
  1164→
  1165→	data := s.updateOwnTelemetryData(map[string]any{}, "Metrics", settings.GetOwnMetrics())
  1166→	data = s.updateOwnTelemetryData(data, "Logs", settings.GetOwnLogs())
  1167→	data = s.updateOwnTelemetryData(data, "Traces", settings.GetOwnTraces())
  1168→
  1169→	if len(data) == 0 {
  1170→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Disabling own telemetry pipeline in the config")
  1171→	} else {
  1172→		err := s.ownTelemetryTemplate.Execute(&cfg, data)
  1173→		if err != nil {
  1174→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not setup own telemetry", zap.Error(err))
  1175→			return
  1176→		}
  1177→	}
  1178→	s.agentConfigOwnMetricsSection.Store(cfg.String())
  1179→
  1180→	// Need to recalculate the Agent config so that the metric config is included in it.
  1181→	configChanged, err := s.composeMergedConfig(s.remoteConfig)
  1182→	if err != nil {
  1183→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Error composing merged config for own metrics. Ignoring agent self metrics config", zap.Error(err))
  1184→		return
  1185→	}
  1186→
  1187→	return configChanged
  1188→}
  1189→
  1190→// composeMergedConfig composes the merged config from multiple sources:
  1191→// 1) the remote config from OpAMP Server
  1192→// 2) the own metrics config section
  1193→// 3) the local override config that is hard-coded in the Supervisor.
  1194→func (s *Supervisor) composeMergedConfig(incomingConfig *protobufs.AgentRemoteConfig) (configChanged bool, err error) {
  1195→	k := koanf.New("::")
  1196→
  1197→	hasIncomingConfigMap := len(incomingConfig.GetConfig().GetConfigMap()) != 0
  1198→
  1199→	if hasIncomingConfigMap {
  1200→		c := incomingConfig.GetConfig()
  1201→
  1202→		// Sort to make sure the order of merging is stable.
  1203→		var names []string
  1204→		for name := range c.ConfigMap {
  1205→			if name == "" {
  1206→				// skip instance config
  1207→				continue
  1208→			}
  1209→			names = append(names, name)
  1210→		}
  1211→
  1212→		sort.Strings(names)
  1213→
  1214→		// Append instance config as the last item.
  1215→		names = append(names, "")
  1216→
  1217→		// Merge received configs.
  1218→		for _, name := range names {
  1219→			item := c.ConfigMap[name]
  1220→			if item == nil {
  1221→				continue
  1222→			}
  1223→			k2 := koanf.New("::")
  1224→			err = k2.Load(rawbytes.Provider(item.Body), yaml.Parser())
  1225→			if err != nil {
  1226→				return false, fmt.Errorf("cannot parse config named %s: %w", name, err)
  1227→			}
  1228→			err = k.Merge(k2)
  1229→			if err != nil {
  1230→				return false, fmt.Errorf("cannot merge config named %s: %w", name, err)
  1231→			}
  1232→		}
  1233→	} else {
  1234→		// Add noop pipeline
  1235→		var noopConfig []byte
  1236→		noopConfig, err = s.composeNoopPipeline()
  1237→		if err != nil {
  1238→			return false, fmt.Errorf("could not compose noop pipeline: %w", err)
  1239→		}
  1240→
  1241→		if err = k.Load(rawbytes.Provider(noopConfig), yaml.Parser(), koanf.WithMergeFunc(configMergeFunc)); err != nil {
  1242→			return false, fmt.Errorf("could not merge noop pipeline: %w", err)
  1243→		}
  1244→	}
  1245→
  1246→	// Merge own metrics config.
  1247→	ownMetricsCfg, ok := s.agentConfigOwnMetricsSection.Load().(string)
  1248→	if ok {
  1249→		if err = k.Load(rawbytes.Provider([]byte(ownMetricsCfg)), yaml.Parser(), koanf.WithMergeFunc(configMergeFunc)); err != nil {
  1250→			return false, err
  1251→		}
  1252→	}
  1253→
  1254→	// Merge local config last since it has the highest precedence.
  1255→	if err = k.Load(rawbytes.Provider(s.composeExtraLocalConfig()), yaml.Parser(), koanf.WithMergeFunc(configMergeFunc)); err != nil {
  1256→		return false, err
  1257→	}
  1258→
  1259→	if err = k.Load(rawbytes.Provider(s.composeOpAMPExtensionConfig()), yaml.Parser(), koanf.WithMergeFunc(configMergeFunc)); err != nil {
  1260→		return false, err
  1261→	}
  1262→
  1263→	if err = k.Load(rawbytes.Provider(s.composeAgentConfigFiles()), yaml.Parser(), koanf.WithMergeFunc(configMergeFunc)); err != nil {
  1264→		return false, err
  1265→	}
  1266→
  1267→	// The merged final result is our new merged config.
  1268→	newMergedConfigBytes, err := k.Marshal(yaml.Parser())
  1269→	if err != nil {
  1270→		return false, err
  1271→	}
  1272→
  1273→	// Check if supervisor's merged config is changed.
  1274→
  1275→	newConfigState := &configState{
  1276→		mergedConfig:     string(newMergedConfigBytes),
  1277→		configMapIsEmpty: (incomingConfig != nil && !hasIncomingConfigMap),
  1278→	}
  1279→
  1280→	configChanged = false
  1281→
  1282→	oldConfigState := s.cfgState.Swap(newConfigState)
  1283→	if oldConfigState == nil || !oldConfigState.(*configState).equal(newConfigState) {
  1284→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Merged config changed.")
  1285→		configChanged = true
  1286→	}
  1287→
  1288→	return configChanged, nil
  1289→}

  1291→func (s *Supervisor) handleRestartCommand() error {
  1292→	s.agentRestarting.Store(true)
  1293→	defer s.agentRestarting.Store(false)

  1295→	err := s.commander.Restart(context.Background())
  1296→	if err != nil {
  1297→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not restart agent process", zap.Error(err))

  1299→	return err

  1302→func (s *Supervisor) startAgent() (agentStartStatus, error) {
  1303→	if s.cfgState.Load().(*configState).configMapIsEmpty {
  1304→		// Don't start the agent if there is no config to run
  1305→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Info("No config present, not starting agent.")
  1306		// need to manually trigger updating effective config
  1307→		err := s.opampClient.UpdateEffectiveConfig(context.Background())
  1308→		if err != nil {
  1309→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("The OpAMP client failed to update the effective config", zap.Error(err))
  1310→		}
  1311→		return agentNotStarting, nil
  1312→	}
  1313→
  1314→	err := s.commander.Start(context.Background())
  1315→	if err != nil {
  1316→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Cannot start the agent", zap.Error(err))
  1317→		startErr := fmt.Errorf("cannot start the agent: %w", err)
  1318→		err = s.opampClient.SetHealth(&protobufs.ComponentHealth{Healthy: false, LastError: startErr.Error()})
  1319→		if err != nil {
  1320→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to report OpAMP client health", zap.Error(err))
  1321→		}
  1322→		return "", startErr
  1323→	}
  1324→
  1325→	s.agentHasStarted = false
  1326→	s.agentStartHealthCheckAttempts = 0
  1327→	s.startedAt = time.Now()
  1328→
  1329→	return agentStarting, nil
  1330→}
  1331→
  1332→func (s *Supervisor) runAgentProcess() {
  1333→	if _, err := os.Stat(s.agentConfigFilePath()); err == nil {
  1334→		// We have an effective config file saved previously. Use it to start the agent.
  1335→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Effective config found, starting agent initial time")
  1336→		_, err := s.startAgent()
  1337→		if err != nil {
  1338→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("starting agent failed", zap.Error(err))
  1339→			s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_FAILED, err.Error())
  1340→		}
  1341→	}
  1342→
  1343→	restartTimer := time.NewTimer(0)
  1344→	restartTimer.Stop()
  1345→
  1346→	configApplyTimeoutTimer := time.NewTimer(0)
  1347→	configApplyTimeoutTimer.Stop()
  1348→
  1349→	for {
  1350→		select {
  1351→		case <-s.hasNewConfig:
  1352→			s.lastHealthFromClient.Store(nil)
  1353→			if !configApplyTimeoutTimer.Stop() {
  1354→				select {
  1355→				case <-configApplyTimeoutTimer.C: // Try to drain the channel
  1356→				default:
  1357→				}
  1358→			}
  1359→			configApplyTimeoutTimer.Reset(s.config.Agent.ConfigApplyTimeout)
  1360→
  1361→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Restarting agent due to new config")
  1362→			restartTimer.Stop()
  1363→			s.stopAgentApplyConfig()
  1364→			status, err := s.startAgent()
  1365→			if err != nil {
  1366→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("starting agent with new config failed", zap.Error(err))
  1367→				s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_FAILED, err.Error())
  1368→			}
  1369→
  1370→			if status == agentNotStarting {
  1371→				// not starting agent because of nop config, clear timer, report applied status, report healthy status
  1372→				configApplyTimeoutTimer.Stop()
  1373→				s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_APPLIED, "")
  1374→				if err := s.opampClient.SetHealth(&protobufs.ComponentHealth{Healthy: true, LastError: ""}); err != nil {
  1375→					s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not report healthy status to OpAMP server", zap.Error(err))
  1376→				}
  1377→				// need to clear exit channel to avoid triggering `s.commander.Exited()` case
  1378→				// because we stopped the agent and aren't restarting it this case will trigger
  1379→				// and report an unhealthy status (collector would be healthy, just choosing to not run)
  1380→				if len(s.commander.Exited()) > 0 {
  1381→					select {
  1382→					case <-s.commander.Exited():
  1383→					default:
  1384→					}
  1385→				}
  1386→			}
  1387→
  1388→		case <-s.commander.Exited():
  1389→			// the agent process exit is expected for restart command and will not attempt to restart
  1390→			if s.agentRestarting.Load() {
  1391→				continue
  1392→			}
  1393→
  1394→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Agent process exited unexpectedly. Will restart in a bit...", zap.Int("pid", s.commander.Pid()), zap.Int("exit_code", s.commander.ExitCode()))
  1395→			errMsg := fmt.Sprintf(
  1396→				"Agent process PID=%d exited unexpectedly, exit code=%d. Will restart in a bit...",
  1397→				s.commander.Pid(), s.commander.ExitCode(),
  1398→			)
  1399→			err := s.opampClient.SetHealth(&protobufs.ComponentHealth{Healthy: false, LastError: errMsg})
  1400→			if err != nil {
  1401→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not report health to OpAMP server", zap.Error(err))
  1402→			}
  1403→
  1404→			// TODO: decide why the agent stopped. If it was due to bad config, report it to server.
  1405→			// https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/issues/21079
  1406→
  1407→			// Wait 5 seconds before starting again.
  1408→			if !restartTimer.Stop() {
  1409→				select {
  1410→				case <-restartTimer.C: // Try to drain the channel
  1411→				default:
  1412→				}
  1413→			}
  1414→			restartTimer.Reset(5 * time.Second)
  1415→
  1416→		case <-restartTimer.C:
  1417→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Agent starting after start backoff")
  1418→			_, err := s.startAgent()
  1419→			if err != nil {
  1420→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("restarting agent failed", zap.Error(err))
  1421→				s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_FAILED, err.Error())
  1422→			}
  1423→
  1424→		case <-configApplyTimeoutTimer.C:
  1425→			lastHealth := s.lastHealthFromClient.Load()
  1426→			if lastHealth == nil || !lastHealth.Healthy {
  1427→				s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_FAILED, "Config apply timeout exceeded")
  1428→			} else {
  1429→				s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_APPLIED, "")
  1430→			}
  1431→
  1432→		case <-s.doneChan:
  1433→			err := s.commander.Stop(context.Background())
  1434→			if err != nil {
  1435→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not stop agent process", zap.Error(err))
  1436→			}
  1437→			return
  1438→		}
  1439→	}
  1440→}

  1442→func (s *Supervisor) stopAgentApplyConfig() {
  1443→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Stopping the agent to apply new config")
  1444→	cfgState := s.cfgState.Load().(*configState)
  1445→	err := s.commander.Stop(context.Background())

  1449→
  1450→	if err := os.WriteFile(s.agentConfigFilePath(), []byte(cfgState.mergedConfig), 0o600); err != nil {

  1454→
  1455→func (s *Supervisor) Shutdown() {
  1456→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Supervisor shutting down...")
  1457→	close(s.doneChan)
  1458→
  1459→	// Shutdown in order from producer to consumer (agent -> customMessageForwarder -> local OpAMP server -> client to remote OpAMP server).
  1460→	s.agentWG.Wait()
  1461→	s.customMessageWG.Wait()
  1462→
  1463→	if s.opampServer != nil {
  1464→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Stopping OpAMP server...")
  1465→		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
  1466→		defer cancel()
  1467→
  1468→		err := s.opampServer.Stop(ctx)
  1469→		if err != nil {
  1470→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not stop the OpAMP Server")
  1471→		} else {
  1472→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("OpAMP server stopped.")
  1473→		}
  1474→	}
  1475→
  1476→	if s.opampClient != nil {
  1477→		err := s.opampClient.SetHealth(
  1478→			&protobufs.ComponentHealth{
  1479→				Healthy: false, LastError: "Supervisor is shutdown",
  1480→			},
  1481→		)
  1482→		if err != nil {
  1483→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not report health to OpAMP server", zap.Error(err))
  1484→		}
  1485→
  1486→		err = s.stopOpAMPClient()
  1487→		if err != nil {
  1488→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not stop the OpAMP client", zap.Error(err))
  1489→		}
  1490→	}
  1491→
  1492→	if err := s.shutdownTelemetry(); err != nil {
  1493→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not shut down self telemetry", zap.Error(err))
  1494→	}
  1495→}
  1496→
  1497→func (s *Supervisor) shutdownTelemetry() error {
  1498→	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
  1499→	defer cancel()
  1500→	// The metric.MeterProvider and trace.TracerProvider interfaces do not have a Shutdown method.

  1502→	type shutdownable interface {

  1514→	if prov, ok := s.telemetrySettings.TracerProvider.(shutdownable); ok {

  1516→			err = multierr.Append(err, fmt.Errorf("failed to shutdown tracer provider: %w", shutdownErr))
  1517→		}
  1518→	}

  1520→	if prov, ok := s.telemetrySettings.loggerProvider.(shutdownable); ok {

  1524→	}

  1582→			OwnTraces:  msg.OwnTracesConnSettings,
  1583→			OwnLogs:    msg.OwnLogsConnSettings,
  1584→		}) || configChanged
  1585→	}
  1586→

  1588→	if configChanged {
  1589→		err := s.opampClient.UpdateEffectiveConfig(ctx)
  1590→		if err != nil {
  1591→			s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("The OpAMP client failed to update the effective config", zap.Error(err))
  1592→		}
  1593→
  1594→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Config is changed. Signal to restart the agent")
  1595→		// Signal that there is a new config.
  1596→		select {
  1597→		case s.hasNewConfig <- struct{}{}:
  1598→		default:
  1599→		}
  1600→	}
  1601→
  1602→	messageToAgent := &protobufs.ServerToAgent{
  1603→		InstanceUid: s.persistentState.InstanceID[:],
  1604→	}
  1605→	haveMessageForAgent := false
  1606→	// Proxy server capabilities to opamp extension
  1607→	if msg.CustomCapabilities != nil {
  1608→		messageToAgent.CustomCapabilities = msg.CustomCapabilities
  1609→		haveMessageForAgent = true
  1610→	}
  1611→
  1612→	// Proxy server messages to opamp extension
  1613→	if msg.CustomMessage != nil {
  1614→		messageToAgent.CustomMessage = msg.CustomMessage
  1615→		haveMessageForAgent = true
  1616→	}
  1617→
  1618→	// Send any messages that need proxying to the agent.
  1619→	if haveMessageForAgent {
  1620→		conn, ok := s.agentConn.Load().(serverTypes.Connection)
  1621→		if ok {
  1622→			err := conn.Send(ctx, messageToAgent)
  1623→			if err != nil {
  1624→				s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Error forwarding message to agent from server", zap.Error(err))
  1625→			}
  1626→		}
  1627→	}

  1631→func (s *Supervisor) processRemoteConfigMessage(msg *protobufs.AgentRemoteConfig) bool {
  1632→	if err := s.saveLastReceivedConfig(msg); err != nil {
  1633→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Could not save last received remote config", zap.Error(err))
  1634→	}
  1635→

  1641→	if err != nil {

  1643→		s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_FAILED, err.Error())

  1647→		s.saveAndReportConfigStatus(protobufs.RemoteConfigStatuses_RemoteConfigStatuses_APPLYING, "")

  1661→// processAgentIdentificationMessage processes an AgentIdentification message, returning true if the agent config has changed.
  1662→func (s *Supervisor) processAgentIdentificationMessage(msg *protobufs.AgentIdentification) bool {
  1663→	newInstanceID, err := uuid.FromBytes(msg.NewInstanceUid)
  1664→	if err != nil {
  1665→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to parse instance UUID", zap.Error(err))
  1666→		return false
  1667→	}
  1668→
  1669→	s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Debug("Agent identity is changing",
  1670→		zap.String("old_id", s.persistentState.InstanceID.String()),
  1671→		zap.String("new_id", newInstanceID.String()))
  1672→
  1673→	err = s.persistentState.SetInstanceID(newInstanceID)
  1674→	if err != nil {
  1675→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to persist new instance ID, instance ID will revert on restart.", zap.String("new_id", newInstanceID.String()), zap.Error(err))
  1676→	}
  1677→
  1678→	err = s.opampClient.SetAgentDescription(s.agentDescription.Load().(*protobufs.AgentDescription))
  1679→	if err != nil {
  1680→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Failed to send agent description to OpAMP server")
  1681→	}
  1682→
  1683→	// Need to recalculate the Agent config so that the new agent identification is included in it.
  1684→	configChanged, err := s.composeMergedConfig(s.remoteConfig)
  1685→	if err != nil {
  1686→		s.telemetrySettings.Logger.Error("Error composing merged config with new instance ID", zap.Error(err))
  1687→		return false
  1688→	}
  1689→
  1690→	return configChanged
  1691→}

  1747→// The default koanf behavior is to override lists in the config.
  1748→// Instead, we provide this function, which merges the source and destination config's
  1749→// extension lists by concatenating the two.
  1750→// Will be resolved by https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/issues/8754
  1751→func configMergeFunc(src, dest map[string]any) error {
  1752→	srcExtensions := maps.Search(src, []string{"service", "extensions"})
  1753→	destExtensions := maps.Search(dest, []string{"service", "extensions"})
  1754→
  1755→	maps.Merge(src, dest)
  1756→
  1757→	if destExt, ok := destExtensions.([]any); ok {
  1758→		if srcExt, ok := srcExtensions.([]any); ok {
  1759→			if service, ok := dest["service"].(map[string]any); ok {
  1760→				allExt := slices.Concat(destExt, srcExt)
  1761→				// This is a small hack to ensure that the order is consitent and
  1762→				// follows this simple rule: extensions from [src], then from [dest],
  1763→				// in the order that they appear.
  1764→				// We cannot use other simpler methods, like [sort.Strings], because
  1765→				// we work with a `[]any` that cannot be cast to `[]string`.
  1766→				seenExt := make(map[any]struct{}, len(allExt))
  1767→				var uniqueExts []any
  1768→				for _, ext := range allExt {
  1769→					if _, ok := seenExt[ext]; !ok {
  1770→						seenExt[ext] = struct{}{}
  1771→						uniqueExts = append(uniqueExts, ext)
  1772→					}
  1773→				}
  1774→				service["extensions"] = uniqueExts
  1775→			}
  1776→		}
  1777→	}
  1778→
  1779→	return nil
  1780→}

1→# OpAMP for OpenTelemetry Collector
     2→
     3→Author: Tigran Najaryan
     4→
     5→## Introduction
     6→
     7→[OpAMP](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opamp-spec) has been one of
     8→the most requested capabilities at Kubecon 2022. We can implement OpAMP
     9→for the Collector in 2 different ways:
    10→
    11→- As a Collector extension, with limited functionality,
    12→- As an external Supervisor, that implements all or most of OpAMP
    13→    capabilities.
    14→
    15→In discussions with users and Collector contributors we found that both
    16→of these approaches are wanted. This document describes how to implement
    17→both while minimizing duplicate work.
    18→
    19→The main idea is to implement a Collector extension with a limited set
    20→of OpAMP capabilities, where the extension can be used on its own, then
    21→additionally create an external Supervisor that uses the exact same
    22→extension as a helper and implements the remaining OpAMP capabilities on
    23→top of what the extension implements. This way most of OpAMP-related
    24→functionality is implemented once only, there is virtually no code
    25→duplication.
    26→
    27→## Supervised Operation
    28→
    29→This section describes a specialized Supervisor made for OpenTelemetry
    30→Collector. The Supervisor will have the benefit of knowing for example
    31→how to inject desirable values into the Collector's configuration file.
    32→
    33→Here is how a Supervisor-based management works:
    34→
    35→![Supervisor architecture diagram](supervisor-diagram.png)
    36→
    37→The Supervisor process does the following:
    38→
    39→- Implements the client-side of OpAMP protocol and communicates with
    40→    the OpAMP Backend.
    41→- Starts/stops the Collector process as necessary.
    42→- Receives configuration from the OpAMP Backend and pushes it to the
    43→    Collector, using the Collector config.yaml file as an intermediary,
    44→    restarting the Collector process as necessary.
    45→- Serves as a watchdog, restarts the Collector process if the
    46→    Collector crashes.
    47→- Accepts an OpAMP connection from Collectors' [*opamp
    48→    extension*](#collectors-opamp-extension), receives the Collector's
    49→    AgentDescription, HealthStatus and EffectiveConfig messages and
    50→    forwards them to the OpAMP Backend.
    51→- Optionally: downloads Collector executable packages offered by the
    52→    Backend and performs the Collector updates.
    53→- Optionally: configures Collector to collect Collector's own metrics
    54→    and report the metrics to the OTLP telemetry backend requested by
    55→    OpAMP Backend.
    56→- Optionally: collects Collector logs and sends them to the Telemetry
    57→    Backend via OTLP.
    58→
    59→Supervisor is implemented as a Go library that may be customized and
    60→rebuilt by vendors with useful default configurations, such as the OpAMP
    61→Backend endpoint to connect to, in order to minimize the manual
    62→configuration required.
    63→
    64→*Important: the Supervisor needs to be highly stable, so we need to keep
    65→its complexity and functionality to minimum. The features listed in this
    66→section need a critical review and may be removed (responsibility moved
    67→elsewhere, e.g. to the Collector itself).*
    68→
    69→### Supervisor Configuration
    70→
    71→The Supervisor is configured via a yaml config file:
    72→
    73→```yaml
    74→# OpAMP backend server settings.
    75→server:
    76→  # endpoint is a URL and is mandatory.
    77→  # ws,wss,http,https schemes are supported.
    78→  # Other connection settings, e.g. TLS cert, etc.
    79→  endpoint: wss://example.com/opamp
    80→
    81→# Keys with boolean true/false values that enable a particular
    82→# OpAMP capability.
    83→# The Supervisor will accept remote configuration from the Server.
    84→# If enabled the Supervisor will also report RemoteConfig status
    85→# to the Server.
    86→capabilities:
    87→  accepts_remote_config: # false if unspecified
    88→
    89→  # The Supervisor will report EffectiveConfig to the Server.
    90→  reports_effective_config: # true if unspecified
    91→  
    92→  # The Supervisor can accept Collector executable package updates.
    93→  # If enabled the Supervisor will also report package status to the
    94→  # Server.
    95→  accepts_packages: # false if unspecified
    96→  
    97→  # The Collector will report own metrics to the destination specified by
    98→  # the Server.
    99→  reports_own_metrics: # true if unspecified
   100→  
   101→  # The Collector will report own logs to the destination specified by
   102→  # the Server.
   103→  reports_own_logs: # true if unspecified
   104→  
   105→  # The Collector will report own traces to the destination specified by
   106→  # the Server.
   107→  reports_own_traces: # true if unspecified
   108→  
   109→  # The Collector will accept connections settings for exporters
   110→  # from the Server.
   111→  accepts_other_connection_settings: # false if unspecified
   112→  
   113→  # The Supervisor will accept restart requests.
   114→  accepts_restart_command: # true if unspecified
   115→  
   116→  # The Collector will report Health.
   117→  reports_health: # true if unspecified
   118→
   119→storage:
   120→  # A writable directory where the Supervisor can store data
   121→  # (e.g. cached remote config).
   122→  # defaults to /var/lib/otelcol/supervisor on posix systems
   123→  # and %ProgramData%/Otelcol/Supervisor on Windows.
   124→  directory: /path/to/dir
   125→
   126→agent:
   127→  # Path to Collector executable. Required.
   128→  executable: /opt/otelcol/bin/otelcol
   129→
   130→  # The interval on which the Collector checks to see if it's been orphaned.
   131→  orphan_detection_interval: 5s
   132→
   133→  # The maximum wait duration for retrieving bootstrapping information from the agent 
   134→  bootstrap_timeout: 3s
   135→
   136→  # Extra command line flags to pass to the Collector executable.
   137→  args:
   138→
   139→  # Extra environment variables to set when executing the Collector.
   140→  env:
   141→  
   142→  # Optional user name to drop the privileges to when running the
   143→  # Collector process.
   144→  run_as: myuser
   145→  # Path to optional local Collector config files to be merged with the
   146→  # config provided by the OpAMP server.
   147→  config_files: 
   148→    - /etc/otelcol/config.yaml
   149→  # Optional directories that are allowed to be read/written by the
   150→  # Collector.
   151→  # If unspecified then NO access to the filesystem is allowed.
   152→  access_dirs:
   153→    read:
   154→      allow: \[/var/log\]
   155→      deny: \[/var/log/secret_logs\]
   156→    write:
   157→      allow: \[/var/otelcol\]
   158→  
   159→  # Optional key-value pairs to add to either the identifying attributes or
   160→  # non-identifying attributes of the agent description sent to the OpAMP server.
   161→  # Values here override the values in the agent description retrieved from the collector's
   162→  # OpAMP extension (self-reported by the Collector).
   163→  description:
   164→    identifying_attributes:
   165→      client.id: "01HWWSK84BMT7J45663MBJMTPJ"
   166→    non_identifying_attributes:
   167→      custom.attribute: "custom-value"
   168→
   169→  # The port the Supervisor will start its OpAmp server on and the Collector's 
   170→  # OpAmp extension will connect to
   171→  opamp_server_port: 
   172→
   173→# Supervisor's internal telemetry settings.
   174→telemetry:
   175→  # Logs configuration.
   176→  logs:
   177→    # Minimum enabled logging level.
   178→    # Defaults to info.
   179→    level: debug
   180→    # URLs or file paths to write logging output to.
   181→    # Defaults to stderr.
   182→    output_paths:
   183→      - stderr
   184→      - supervisor.log
   185→    # Log processors to emit logs.
   186→    processors:
   187→      - batch:
   188→          exporter:
   189→            otlp:
   190→              protocol: http/protobuf
   191→              endpoint: https://backend:4318
   192→  # Metrics configuration.
   193→  metrics:
   194→    # Verbosity of the metrics output.
   195→    level: detailed
   196→    # Metric readers to emit metrics.
   197→    readers:
   198→      - periodic:
   199→          exporter:
   200→            otlp:
   201→              protocol: http/protobuf
   202→              endpoint: https://backend:4318
   203→  # Traces configuration.
   204→  traces:
   205→    # Verbosity of the spans emitted.
   206→    level: detailed
   207→    # Enabled context propagators.
   208→    propagators:
   209→      - tracecontext
   210→    # Span processors to emit spans.
   211→    processors:
   212→      - batch:
   213→          exporter:
   214→            otlp:
   215→              protocol: http/protobuf
   216→              endpoint: https://backend:4318
   217→  # Resource attributes.
   218→  resource:
   219→    service.namespace: otel-demo
   220→
